title: Senior Doctor - Laurus Labs - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Laurus Labs - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Laurus Labs in Thane offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Laurus Labs:
Laurus Labs is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Laurus Labs!
